description.zh-Hans: 应用简单的透视变换，模拟3D旋转。X轴旋转在顶部/底部水平压缩图像。Y轴旋转根据行位置应用水平倾斜。缩放控制整体缩放比例。
description.en: Applies a simple perspective-like transform simulating 3D rotation. Rotation X compresses the image horizontally at top/bottom. Rotation Y applies a horizontal skew based on row position. Scale controls overall zoom.

triggers.zh-Hans: 透视变换, 透视变形, 3D旋转, 透视投影
triggers.en: perspective transform, perspective warp, 3D rotate, perspective projection

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 对图像应用透视旋转，模拟3D视角。
exampleUsage.en: Apply perspective rotation to an image to simulate a 3D viewpoint.
